---
title: "Challenge questions"
editor: 
  mode: source
---
  
{{< include ../_macros.qmd >}}

{{< include ../blocks/_challenge_header.qmd >}}

Find a new error (not just typo) on the course material, and file 
an issue on the [github Issues page](https://github.com/UBC-Stat-ML/web447/issues). 
Make sure to look first in the [closed issues page](https://github.com/UBC-Stat-ML/web447/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aclosed) 
since only previously unreported errors will be considered. 

Issues for typos are welcome too, but will not count towards this challenge.
